items.formula_cn: g_volatility_sym_jump_ratio_5m__minute_realized_vol_5m = (列(跳跃ratio5m) - 列(minuterealized成交量5m)) / (|列(跳跃ratio5m)| + |列(minuterealized成交量5m)| + EPS)

items.formula_cn: g_volatility_sym_realized_vol_20__downside_vol_ratio_20 = (列(realized成交量20) - 列(downside成交量ratio20)) / (|列(realized成交量20)| + |列(downside成交量ratio20)| + EPS)
